payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Who knew? With Captain Damon, who had previously taken you guys to Vasselheim long ago. You, through the druidic mastery of Keyleth, tore through a storm that would have slowed your arrival, seemingly forcing an earlier arrival than expected from the team at Glintshore. You guys went into full-on Avengers mode and tore into their ship, destroying it in the bay outside of Glintshore, swooped down onto the edge of the dark glass- and soot-covered beach and you now are all gathering the scenery around you as to what your next point in this aggressive maneuver is. So at this point in time, you've all gathered along the eastern beach of Glintshore. Grog, you are still an eagle, a giant eagle, polymorphed by Scanlan. You have your wings out still. You guys have flown about and you've seen the remnants of some sort of small campsite, with a faint ember still burning and giving off a hint of smoke, but it's been a while since it's been utilized.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who knew?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About five hours. You just got there and checked it right now. We'll get into the more specifics of that here in a moment. So we have currently, if I recall, Grog as an eagle, Scanlan, and who else is in the center of the beach area between the actual shoreline and the jungle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We said like five hours is what I--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys land at the treeline. As you land, Laura, Percy and Keyleth, you guys-- there's this breeze that's been blowing through the beach since you've gotten here, it's starting to pulse a little. (wind sounds) And the wind's starting to pick up, rather suddenly. Keyleth, you are relatively sensitive to this, knowing that the sky has been relatively clear with bits of cloud. There's no particular reason as to why there should be a sudden gust of wind. There is no weather that is indicative of that sort of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah. You coast up and begin pushing through and down below, you can see occasional breaks in the treeline here and there where you can-- there's heavy brush underneath and the same horrible texture of broken glass jutting out in haphazard patterns. There are certain areas where the glass is aggressively broken, and some more smooth glass. It looks like it depends on at what point this event happened that turned this entire island and how much has been traversed in the time. But you can't make out much more than that from your height.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Have I got about 30 or 40 minutes left for the wings?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Approximately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm going to fly out over where the ship was and see if anybody is doing the dog paddle out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You go heading off in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll land us at the treeline.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I would like you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also my Control Weather spell should still be active.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So nature check? Druid check? What the shit is happening check?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nurture check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nurture check? Nature versus nurture check? 14?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14. This is definitely not a natural wind. And as you start to get that dark feeling at the back of your head, you start noticing that some of the broken glass that is across the entirety of this beach being picked up by the wind. Swirling and congealing into a small whirlwind of broken glass and dust.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I toss Percy his gun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the wind begins to pick up into two other separate, smaller shapes, but that one central funnel continues to grow and grow, like this angry, waving tornado of broken--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to flip one of the boats over as a shield and hide behind it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As a druid, would I recognize if this is an air elemental situation?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh, why are they always intelligence--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With advantage because it is possibly elemental-based.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two of the entities that are coming out of this wind from the sides are definitely air elemental by nature. You're very familiar with this form of physicality. You've taken on this form of physicality. However, whatever this large, strange glass-shard-encompassed entity is, it's elemental in nature but you're not sure what it is. You've not encountered something of this form, at least on this plane.

preceding_turns.text: Bigger?

preceding_turns.text: Bigger.

preceding_turns.text: Oh god! I killed Percy! There we go. And Vax, you're off that side. What you're seeing is this swirling torrent of broken glass with these two air elementals encroaching on the sides there.

You do manage to find purchase. It takes some damage. That ends your turn. It is now its turn. It moves into both of your spaces now, we'll say up against the two of you there--

The thug turns to her and says, "You also said they wouldn't be arriving to the island for another day or so. We don't have time to drag our prize to the transport site." Anna returns immediately with a "You are a fool to argue with your superior, child. I hired you as a bodyguard, nothing more. I plot, you protect. If this doesn't suit you, allow me to fire you from service." She pulls one of her guns out and cocks it and points it. He goes, "No, I mean no disrespect, but we must begin setting a trap here now if we hope to stop them."

The smell of heavy gunpowder recently burned sits in the air as the giant cloud of smoke rises up in the center of the jungle. At this point in time, the goliath has stepped forward from the brush, as well as two other figures off to the side wielding long-barreled rifle-like weapons. There are a few other figures on this side, as well.

preceding_turns.text: And everybody sees everybody, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everybody sees everybody right now. I need you all to roll initiative. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, overweight. Don't fucking fail me now. That's all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Gil. Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow. You like that dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is that Gil's dice again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's been doing fine for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's been hit or miss.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, same here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Although I will admit, I rolled gold for this roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: "I rolled gold."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I did.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Bitch.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You see him shaken. There's sweat on the face. That ends his turn. It is now the barbarian. Not the barbarian, the goliath's turn. There, is going to attempt to make an athletics check to climb. That's enough. Gets up just barely to the top and that's not going to be enough to really do much else on her turn, unfortunately. Messed up everything she's been trying to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I swear to god, if he drops me, I'm going to be so pissed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 points of piercing damage to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to make a concentration check. Just roll a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do I have to roll over?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It would be ten or higher. Don't roll low. Constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You make it! You maintain concentration. However, as the blade hits you, you watch as it was thrown, you notice Kynan shifts into shadow and goes after the blade, vanishing. The blade strikes you, and then suddenly Kynan's hand appears where the blade stabbed you, and he appears next to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Where?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Up on the log, right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Kynan! Hey, man! What's up?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, it is now Kynan's turn. Kynan is stunned. The stun wears off at the end, but Kynan is left there breathing heavy, looking down at the two bleeding bodies before him. One that is, eyes flash open on the ground, and Keyleth currently face down in the dirt, with a little puddle of blood around the corner of her mouth. At the end of Kynan's turn, Scanlan, you are conscious, but you are prone on the ground right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Athletics, you said? Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't get out of the crevasse. You try climbing and the rock's breaking away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: On my movement? What happens with my dash and my action?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make another attempt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll do it again. Fucking A. Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get almost to the edge and the glass breaks. You slide back down into the crevasse.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Again. Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You climb up to the edge. (panting) That's your turn, but you're out of the crater.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to shout  Kynan, you have a heart! Think of Emon! What are you doing? It's not too late!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 17. No, sorry, 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19. Okay. That ends Vax's turn. Keyleth? I need you to make a death saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You have a success!

payload.raw_text: All right, you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right. I run over to Keyleth.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's half your movement. You can move that far, and you take two points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, sure. I'll Healing Word at level two to get her back to life.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, that's a bonus action. So that's 2d4 plus six.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ahh, what a crazy dream. Nope, it's real.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Anything would be helpful right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan! I'll tell you what I want, what I really really want!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, tell me what you want, what you really really want!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want-uh, I want-uh, I want-uh, I want to go fuck them up!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. I run over to Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's half your movement. You can move that far, and you take two points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure. I'll Healing Word at level two to get her back to life.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's a bonus action. So that's 2d4 plus six.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 2d4 plus six is ten. No, 12.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Nice. That end your turn? It's now her turn. First, she's going to use her bonus action to use her Second Wind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nothing magic here, bitch. I will go reckless, Great Weapon Master at Ripley, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Reckless, Great Weapon Master.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what it means, but it sounds good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It sounds great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 28? That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why am I not always doing Great Weapon Master? What the fuck is the matter with me? 28, with a point of necrotic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A little bit of blood spatters across the ground near her. She takes the wound and shrinks away a bit, clutching her chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What, the cloak not helping you with that one?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Percy is, however, prone, so you have advantage on the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm rerolling that. Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 30 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Percy, you take ten points of psychic damage. Still conscious, though, right? Vax, you also take ten points of psychic damage. Kynan actually does make his save, strangely. Really high roll. However, Percy, as you feel the rampage pulse hit you, your eyes go red, and suddenly you're surrounded by shadow entirely. You pull the gun over, and you fire at something that's nearby. I need you to make a single pistol attack, with disadvantage, against Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With disadvantage? Wow, this is here to hurt me. Let's pistol shot with disadvantage. Three, so 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Strikes the wood and splinters off. Vax, I need you to make a dagger attack against Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Misses!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a six, plus 11, is 17.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so it is now her turn. She is going to appear right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Been there, done that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Percy. Big money, no whammies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Orthax's turn. Percy, it's your turn. Roll a death saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is this it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Golden snitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ten. I don't remember!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe that is not a failure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think it's ten or higher, right? Are you shitting me? You rolled a fucking ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was on the money.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, ten or higher you succeed! (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Guys, let me say I have the coolest character lined up, but okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I see Scanlan prepare for the bamf, and can I move to the other side of the last place I saw her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan is standing where she was last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, can I move opposite of him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe a little bit further. Yeah, and turn toward that space, and I'll hold my action until I see her. Bitch.
